commands.payload:
1.3.0

Usage:  [options] [command]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help  Show help information
  -v | --version    Show version information

Commands:
  sign  Signs a file or set of files

Use " [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage:  sign [options]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help       Show help information
  -c | --config          Path to config json file
  -i | --input           Path to input file
  -b | --baseDirectory   Base directory for files to override the working directory
  -o | --output          Path to output. May be same as input to overwrite
  -f | --filelist        Full path to file containing paths of files to sign within an archive
  -s | --secret          Client Secret
  -r | --user            Username
  -n | --name            Name of project for tracking
  -d | --description     Description
  -u | --descriptionUrl  Description Url
  -m | --maxConcurrency  Maximum concurrency (default is 4)
  -l | --logLevel        Logging level (default is warn)

commands.payload:
Usage:  sign [options]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help       Show help information
  -c | --config          Path to config json file
  -i | --input           Path to input file
  -b | --baseDirectory   Base directory for files to override the working directory
  -o | --output          Path to output. May be same as input to overwrite
  -f | --filelist        Full path to file containing paths of files to sign within an archive
  -s | --secret          Client Secret
  -r | --user            Username
  -n | --name            Name of project for tracking
  -d | --description     Description
  -u | --descriptionUrl  Description Url
  -m | --maxConcurrency  Maximum concurrency (default is 4)
  -l | --logLevel        Logging level (default is warn)
